navbar.signedOutDesc: You have been signed out of Handcrafted Haven.

footer.sustainablyDesc: Materials and makers are reviewed for responsible practices.
footer.artisanDesc: Profiles, workshops, and listings are curated for authenticity.
footer.communityDesc: Every purchase supports independent craft and local economies.
footer.tagline: A curated marketplace for soulful objects, transparent maker stories, and sustainable consumption.

home.heroBadge: Curated handmade goods from verified artisans
home.heroTitle: Objects with soul, made by real hands.
home.heroDesc: Discover ceramics, textiles, woodwork, jewelry, and custom pieces from independent makers who value craft, story, and sustainability.
home.findHandmade: Find the right kind of handmade.
home.sellerTitle: Give artisans a studio, not just a storefront.
home.sellerDesc: Sellers can tell their story, publish detailed product listings, build trust through reviews, and connect with customers who care about materials, origin, and process.

ceramics.name: Ceramics
ceramics.description: Wheel-thrown vessels, tableware, and sculptural clay.

textiles.name: Textiles
textiles.description: Woven throws, linen goods, natural dyes, and heirloom cloth.

woodwork.name: Woodwork
woodwork.description: Live-edge boards, carved objects, furniture, and home goods.

jewelry.name: Jewelry
jewelry.description: Small-batch metalwork, gemstones, and wearable keepsakes.

moonlight-vase.name: Moonlight Speckled Vase
moonlight-vase.description: A tactile stoneware vase with iron-rich speckling and a satin glaze, made in small batches for collectors who value quiet, sculptural forms.

organic-cloud-throw.name: Organic Cloud Throw
organic-cloud-throw.description: A handwoven throw with generous texture, made from organic cotton and finished by a family-run textile studio.

walnut-board.name: Live-Edge Walnut Board
walnut-board.description: A polished live-edge serving board shaped from reclaimed walnut and finished with food-safe oil.

nordic-teapot.name: Nordic Drip Teapot
nordic-teapot.description: A luminous glazed teapot with a woven bamboo handle and a compact profile for daily rituals.

hammered-cuff.name: Hammered Copper Cuff
hammered-cuff.description: A hand-hammered copper cuff with an organic edge and warm patina that deepens over time.

linen-napkin-set.name: Pure Linen Napkin Set
linen-napkin-set.description: A set of four soft linen napkins, cut and sewn in-house with a hand-dyed sage finish.

elena-rossi-studio.title: Elena Rossi on the Poetry of Clay
elena-rossi-studio.excerpt: Inside a hillside studio where clay, mineral glazes, and old-world firing traditions become everyday vessels.

arlo-finch-woodworking.title: Where Trees Become Tables
arlo-finch-woodworking.excerpt: A Vermont woodworker explains how salvaged walnut becomes heirloom boards and furniture with visible history.

heritage-weaves-story.title: The Slow Textile Movement
heritage-weaves-story.excerpt: Heritage Weaves is proving that soft goods can be luxurious, traceable, and responsibly made.

featuredSeller.story: Founded in the heart of the red rocks, Earth & Ember is a celebration of desert clay, patient hands, and functional objects that carry a sense of place.
